title: Bike Touring - Switzerland - Basel to Zurich. 4-2010

transcript.text: The center of Basel, Switzerland, and this is some kind of cute building with like Jesus, Jesus people on there, and look at that guy with Jesus and his wife, and it looks like Michelangelo actually, and you've got, it's cute, I like it, it's distinct.
